title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build agentic AI applications using Claude Code across three interfaces: desktop app, terminal CLI, and VS Code integration. The example project is an AI resume and cover letter generator supporting multiple themes and skill analysis. Covers setup, API configuration, local execution, and debugging workflows.
